description: Your university rocketry team is preparing their dual-deploy high-power rocket for a competition launch at Spaceport America, New Mexico. As the team's simulation specialist, update the 'dual_parachute_deployment.ork' simulation in OpenRocket to match the site conditions: 1401 m altitude, 1.8 m launch rod length, 5 degrees launch rod angle, 32.99° N latitude, -106.97° W longitude, 8 m/s average wind speed, and 15% wind turbulence intensity. Run the simulation and save the configured rocket design to '~/Documents/rockets/competition_ready.ork'. Write a pre-launch briefing document to '~/Documents/exports/pre_launch_briefing.txt' summarizing the configured parameters, predicted apogee, and maximum velocity.
